data.content: Implemented the Settings > Agents Gemini scan selector update in worktree /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-38f3 on branch feature/gemini-scan-models. The Gemini static scan catalog now exposes exactly five model IDs: gemini-3.1-pro-preview, gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, and gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Gemini import options now ignore out-of-set detected history models so the selector cannot show extra Gemini entries, and Gemini preview labels render as Gemini Pro 3.1 Preview and Gemini Flash 3 Preview. Validation completed in the worktree with bun run test src/lib/__tests__/settings-scan.test.ts, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Commit pushed: ead1e657109c on origin/feature/gemini-scan-models.
